items.title: Boeing Sales Need A Mammoth December To Reach Q4 Targets
items.description: Boeing's sales for the month of November fell compared with the two previous years. In November, Boeing (BA) delivered 44 total new planes to customers, according to Deutsche Bank. That number is down from 48 in 2024 and 56 in 2023. Boeing's November Deliveries The November figures mean Boeing will have to deliver an exceptionally strong December to reach the...

items.title: Meta's Instagram orders employees back to the office 5 days a week
items.description: The RTO policy only applies to Instagram and not to Meta's other family of apps, like Facebook and WhatsApp.

items.title: RTX's Unit Secures a Contract for Sustainment in Support of F-35 Jets
items.description: RTX's unit Pratt & Whitney wins a $1.61B deal to sustain F-35 propulsion systems through 2026, expanding its global defense footprint.
